386c798eceb09d1c: [{"severity": "CRITICAL", "confidence": 10, "path": "src/vectro_mojo/quantizer.mojo", "line": 26, "category": "mojo-memory", "summary": "out.store writes at offset j+w instead of j, shifting every SIMD store one full lane forward and writing out[d..d+w) on the final chunk, which is out of bounds for a d-length buffer.", "fix": "Change out.store[width=w](j + w, q) back to out.store[width=w](j, q)."}]
776f1e04b71b56f4: [{"severity": "CRITICAL", "confidence": 10, "path": "src/vectro_mojo/quantizer.mojo", "line": 24, "category": "mojo-perf", "summary": "out.store writes at offset j+w instead of j, shifting every SIMD write one full lane forward and writing out of bounds on the final chunk.", "fix": "Revert the store offset back to j: out.store[width=w](j, q)."}]
9c9be9be3e7f25d9: [{"severity": "CRITICAL", "confidence": 9, "path": "src/vectro_mojo/quantizer.mojo", "line": 24, "category": "api-surface", "summary": "The store offset was changed from `j` to `j + w`, shifting every write one SIMD lane forward and writing out-of-bounds on the final chunk, silently corrupting or overflowing the caller-supplied output buffer.", "fix": "Revert `out.store[width=w](j + w, q)` back to `out.store[width=w](j, q)` so each lane is written to its correct position within the `d`-length output buffer."}]
a97c8b38c18886b9: [{"severity": "CRITICAL", "confidence": 10, "path": "src/vectro_mojo/quantizer.mojo", "line": 25, "category": "mojo-numerics", "summary": "SIMD store offset is `j + w` instead of `j`, causing every vectorized chunk to be written one full SIMD lane past its intended position, leaving the first `w` output elements unwritten and writing the last chunk `w` elements beyond the end of the `d`-length output buffer.", "fix": "Change `out.store[width=w](j + w, q)` back to `out.store[width=w](j, q)` so each chunk is stored at the index `vectorize` computed for it."}]
